$comment: Plugin marketplaces BrainV2 auto-installs at setup. The organiser (/obs-organiser via knowledge/obs-plugin-routing.md) decides when each is actually used. gstack (garrytan/gstack, 120k+ star Claude Code setup) is intentionally NOT here: it has no .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, so it isn't installable via `claude plugin marketplace add` — it ships its own separate installer (bin/gstack-*) that would need explicit, separate review before running.

marketplaces.name: superpowers
marketplaces.purpose: battle-tested engineering skills: planning, debugging, TDD, subagent patterns

marketplaces.name: claude-skills
marketplaces.purpose: Anthropic's official skill library: docs, spreadsheets, PDFs, design

marketplaces.name: marketing-skills
marketplaces.purpose: marketing copy, positioning, SEO, landing pages, growth engineering

marketplaces.name: social-media-skills
marketplaces.purpose: social content strategy, creation, and analysis
